summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ParkEase MVP - Backend APIs and Frontend integration working perfectly with live data
passed_tests: Backend: Health check API (200 OK)
Backend: Events listing API with live data
Backend: Event details API (62 spots remaining, 88% fill)
Backend: Bay grid API (35 bays, 20 available, 15 taken)
Backend: Bay filtering by lot (north/south)
Backend: Event stats API for operator dashboard
Backend: Booking creation API (201 status, auto-confirm)
Backend: Booking conflict handling (409 for taken bay)
Backend: Booking details API with enriched data
Frontend: Venue landing loads with live backend data
Frontend: Booking flow with bay selection and live data
Frontend: Operator dashboard with live metrics
Frontend: Booking confirmation screen
Frontend: Navigation between all 6 screens
Frontend: Demo navigation controls work
Frontend: Search overlay functionality
Integration: Complete booking flow (venue → booking → confirmation)
Integration: Live data sync between frontend and backend
Integration: Bay selection and booking creation
Integration: Real-time spot count updates
